title: A tribute to golden oldies at Market Theatre
description: ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Get ready for a...
bodyText:
ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Get ready for a nostalgic musical journey when James Marais and Monique Cassells bring A Trip Down Memory Lane to the Market Community Theatre on Friday 7 November.


> Known for their dynamic oldies tribute performances since 2009, the duo celebrates the golden decades of music - from the 1950s to the 1980s - with classics by Elvis Presley, the Beatles, Cliff Richard, Cher, ABBA and Queen.


Marais is known as a tribute artist for Elvis Presley, Neil Diamond and Roy Orbison, whereas Cassells brings the timeless hits of Marilyn Monroe and Cher to life.

Together they perform vibrant duets, enhanced by multiple costume changes and an engaging stage presence.

Tickets cost R130 or R150 and are available through Quicket or Heather Stead on 072 369 3304. - Compiled by Michelle Pienaar

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
